title: centaurea × singeorzana
intro: Centaurea × singeorzana is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, resulting from the cross between Centaurea jacea and Centaurea scabiosa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. Consuming Centaurea × singeorzana has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Centaurea × singeorzana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
